scripts.build: npm run build -w @zhijing/shared && npm run build -w @zhijing/core && npm run build -w @zhijing/pi-runtime && npm run build -w @zhijing/api && npm run build -w @zhijing/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @zhijing/shared && npm run typecheck -w @zhijing/core && npm run typecheck -w @zhijing/pi-runtime && npm run typecheck -w @zhijing/api
